context.p:
The following are the suggested DRG fields for custom reporting. These fields help the users to understand and analyse the suggested DRG for an encounter.
S-DRG Code: The suggested DRG value assigned to an encounter. Example: 562.
S-DRG Description: The description of suggested DRG value. Example: MEDICAL BACK PROBLEMS WITHOUT MCC.
S-DRG Grouper Type: The grouper type of suggested DRG value. Example: APR_DRG.
You can add these fields as columns to a dashboard. Let us take an example from Encounter Details report. Suggested DRG Fields in Encounter Details Dashboard
